preamble.summary: Faithless Israel and Judah. LXX is slightly shorter, with some omissions in the appeal to return.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX omits 3:16b in part. Minor lexical differences throughout.

verses.mt_reading: לֹא יֹאמְרוּ עוֹד אֲרוֹן בְּרִית־יְהוָה וְלֹא יַעֲלֶה עַל־לֵב וְלֹא יִזְכְּרוּ־בוֹ וְלֹא יִפְקֹדוּ וְלֹא יֵעָשֶׂה עוֹד
verses.lxx_reading: οὐκ ἐροῦσιν ἔτι Κιβωτὸς διαθήκης κυρίου· οὐκ ἀναβήσεται ἐπὶ καρδίαν, οὐκ ὀνομασθήσεται, οὐδ᾽ οὐ μὴ ἐπισκεφθῇ
variant_notes: LXX is shorter, omitting 'neither shall it come to mind; neither shall they remember it; neither shall they visit it; neither shall that be done anymore.' MT has an expansive five-fold negative construction; LXX has a simpler form.
LXX and MT are substantially identical here.
